def modify_features(df_input) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """
    Thought 1: The absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight can capture the imbalance in weight distribution.
    New Feature 1: weight_difference | weight_difference = abs(Left-Weight - Right-Weight)
    """
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    """
    Derive new features that capture the underlying patterns and relationships in the balance scale data, 
    including differences in weight and distance, as well as ratios to enhance predictive power and model interpretability.
    """

    # Define a new DataFrame to store the modified features
    df_output = df_input.copy()
    
    # Absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight (previous version)
    df_output['weight_difference'] = abs(df_output['Left-Weight'] - df_output['Right-Weight'])
    
    # Weight imbalancing factor (higher values indicate greater imbalance)
    df_output['weight_imbalance_factor'] = (df_output['weight_difference'] - 1) / (df_output['Left-Weight'] + df_output['Right-Weight'])
    
    # Ratio of Left-Weight to Right-Weight
    df_output['weight_ratio'] = df_output['Left-Weight'] / df_output['Right-Weight']
    
    # Ratio of Left-Distance to Right-Distance
    df_output['distance_ratio'] = df_output['Left-Distance'] / df_output['Right-Distance']
    
    # Net difference in weight (Left-Weight - Right-Weight)
    df_output['net_weight_difference'] = df_output['Left-Weight'] - df_output['Right-Weight']
    
    # Net difference in distance (Left-Distance - Right-Distance)
    df_output['net_distance_difference'] = df_output['Left-Distance'] - df_output['Right-Distance']
    
    # Average weight of Left and Right sides
    df_output['average_weight'] = (df_output['Left-Weight'] + df_output['Right-Weight']) / 2
    
    # Maximum weight of Left and Right sides
    df_output['max_weight'] = max(df_output['Left-Weight'], df_output['Right-Weight'])
    
    # Minimum weight of Left and Right sides
    df_output['min_weight'] = min(df_output['Left-Weight'], df_output['Right-Weight'])
    
    # Average distance of Left and Right sides
    df_output['average_distance'] = (df_output['Left-Distance'] + df_output['Right-Distance']) / 2
    
    # Maximum distance of Left and Right sides
    df_output['max_distance'] = max(df_output['Left-Distance'], df_output['Right-Distance'])
